name: Creatd, Inc.
business: Creatd operates Vocal, a core technology platform that hosts a creator community and generates first-party data for revenue generation. It also has an ecommerce business that sells products directly to consumers. The company plans to generate a significant portion of revenues from advertising and affiliate sales relationships.

exposures.sentence: The increase of $496,757 was attributable to our ecommerce business, which grew from $90,433 in revenue in 2021 to $1,456,593 in 2022.
At the center of our businesses lies Vocal, our core technology platform that hosts our creator community and generates the first-party data that powers our revenue generation.
We plan to generate a significant portion of our revenues from advertising and affiliate sales relationships.
